tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, indicating impaired renal function, and significant proteinuria with low urine specific gravity, suggesting possible glomerular damage. Mild hypoglycemia is noted. Urine is cloudy, brown, and ammoniacal, but without evidence of infection (negative nitrites/leukocytes). Glucosuria and mild ketonuria are present. Findings are consistent with renal impairment, likely of glomerular origin; further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
